title: chelonopsis benthamiana
intro: Chelonopsis benthamiana, also known as Bentham's Chelonopsis or Chinese bugle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high content of iridoid glycosides and flavonoids. The health benefits of Chelonopsis benthamiana include its potential to reduce fever, relieve headaches and body aches, and support the immune system, as well as its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Chelonopsis benthamiana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
